source_reference.citation: Bojic et al., LLM Agents Predict Social Media Reactions but Do Not Outperform Text Classifiers, arXiv:2604.19787.
source_reference.extraction_notes: Targets are abstract-level topline metrics extracted from the frozen cycle_002 PDF. The abstract reports 120,000+ unique agent-persona combinations, 1,511 Serbian participants, 70.7% overall accuracy in Study 1, agent MCC of 0.29 in Study 2, and TF-IDF classifier MCC of 0.36.

population_definition.target_population: Serbian social media users represented by 1,511 participants
population_definition.unit_of_analysis: predicted reaction of a persona-conditioned agent to a social media post
population_definition.notes: This fixture captures abstract-level predictive benchmark metrics only.

questionnaire_or_task.notes: Topline evaluation over like, dislike, comment, share, and no reaction, plus binary like-dislike MCC.
